corrections.note: Running head text matches, but page number at foot is 782, not 799 in prompt; no transcription issue in head itself.
Printed text has neuter article τὸ with ῥῆμα.

corrections.current: κατὰ τοῦ θρόνου καὶ τῆς βασιλείας αὐτοῦ
corrections.correct: κατὰ τοῦ θρόνου καὶ τῆς βασιλείας αὐτοῦ
corrections.note: Body is correct here; no change. Included? no.
Printed apparatus uses corrected-hand siglum; transcription plain c acceptable in UTF-8 context, so likely not a real error.

corrections.current: τοῦ ποταμοῦ] τοις χιμαρρους | ἡ γῆ] τὴν γῆν
corrections.correct: τοῦ ποταμοῦ] τοις χιμαρρους | γῆ] τὴν γῆν
corrections.note: Lemma in print is γῆ], not ἡ γῆ]. Extra article added in transcription.
Bracketed supplied omega has circumflex in print.
Apparatus reads ἀνεστρεψαν ℵA* (vid b), matching body ἀνέστρεψαν; transcript has wrong prefixless form.
Spacing/format of sigla uncertain; not essential.
Lemma is τοῦ ἐλθεῖν, not τον ελθειν.

uncertain.note: Running head appears to read ΙΟΥΔΕΙΘ (not ΙΟΥΔΙΘ); transcription matches image.
After Ταμν. the siglum appears as ℵc.a; transcription seems acceptable though formatting of correction hand may vary.

notes: Most body text is accurate. Ignore marginal verse/line indicators such as 7 (7b,10), 8 (8), 9 (9a), 10 (9b), 11 (11), 12 (12), 13 in the scan; they are not part of the body text. Only clear real errors found: BODY τὸ/τὴν ῥῆμα; APPARATUS extra article before γῆ, ἀνεστρεψαν miscopied as ἀπεστρεψαν, and του/τον ελθειν.
